c_para.board_role: Controller/baseboard for a connected accessible parking sign node
c_para.power_flow: 12V input -> fuse/current limit -> TVS surge clamp -> 5V buck stage -> 3.3V LDO -> controller and low-voltage I/O
c_para.sign_output_flow: VIN_FUSED -> external sign/lamp load -> LAMP_RET -> Q1 low-side MOSFET -> GND
c_para.deployment_assumption: 10 W solar panel with an external low-cost non-MPPT charge controller and battery subsystem delivering regulated 12 V to J1
c_para.power_entry_note: J1 remains a regulated 12 V input only; do not connect a solar panel directly to J1 or J2
c_para.solar_integration_status: This revision does not integrate solar charge control, battery protection, power-path management, or low-voltage disconnect
c_para.j2_note: J2 is a reserved auxiliary or backup battery connection point, not a direct panel input
c_para.communications_note: U4 is a 2x10 modem/GNSS daughtercard header with routed 5V, GND, MODEM_RX, and MODEM_TX plus pads for control and future expansion signals
c_para.manufacturing_assumptions: 2-layer FR-4, 1.6 mm board thickness, 1 oz copper, nominal 12 V field input, external 5 V buck module, on-board 3.3 V regulation
c_para.rough_cost_estimate: Estimated finished field unit with external 10 W solar subsystem: $105-210 in low-volume prototype quantities
c_para.design_status: Board-level concept pending schematic review, BOM and footprint lock, DRC/ERC cleanup, power and thermal review, EMC validation, and external solar chain validation
